summary: Completed frontend testing of UI redesign. All features working correctly on both desktop (1920x900) and mobile (390x844). Login with PIN 2409 works, sidebar navigation works, Wyniki shows table on desktop and cards on mobile, Ideas and Tasks CRUD working.

issues: Login screen shows 'Panel zarządzania' instead of 'Panel Ecommify' as specified in requirements. The sidebar correctly shows 'Panel Ecommify'.

passed_tests: PIN pad with dots indicator - functional
Dashboard desktop (1920x900) - sidebar visible, KPI cards displayed
Dashboard mobile (390x844) - hamburger menu, responsive layout
Wyniki desktop - table with 7 columns (Dzień, Przychód, Netto, Koszty, Zysk, Na os., Akcje)
Wyniki mobile - 28 day cards displayed instead of table
Mobile hamburger menu toggle - opens/closes sidebar
Mobile navigation via sidebar - all nav items clickable
Sidebar navigation items present: Panel główny, Wyniki, Zamówienia, Zadania, Pomysły, Kalendarz, Sklepy, Ustawienia
Adding idea (Dodawanie pomysłu) - dialog opens, form works
Adding task (Dodawanie zadania) - dialog opens, form works
action_items: MINOR: Consider changing 'Panel zarządzania' to 'Panel Ecommify' on the login screen (line 52 in LoginScreen.jsx) to match the sidebar branding

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI flows working on desktop and mobile)

seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up: TEST_Pomysł testowy, TEST_Zadanie testowe
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete UI redesign verified. Desktop: sidebar fixed 240px on left, main content with margin-left. Mobile: hamburger menu toggles sidebar slide-in. Wyniki page: table on desktop (768px+), cards on mobile (<768px). All CRUD dialogs working. Professional light theme with slate-50 background.

mocked_api.note: Shopify/TikTok sync endpoints are placeholder (no real integration)
